summary: The heartbeat expiration fix is present and resolves the resurrection issue, but acquireLock still has a high-risk TOCTOU race that can grant the same repo lock to multiple sessions under concurrent acquisition.

findings.title: Concurrent acquireLock calls can both acquire the same lock
findings.recommendation: Make acquisition atomic, for example by using an exclusive create/open path for missing locks and an atomic compare-and-replace strategy for stale/same-session lock replacement, so only one contender can receive acquired:true.
